revision.comment: 1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates
doing this to force an update since the ambox redirect is messing with things
Bot: remove sole member from [[Category:Deprecated templates kept for historical reasons]]
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23693191906|commit triggered pipeline]]
Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24314731306|commit triggered pipeline]]
